header.gameNote: NCAA FCS FOOTBALL CHAMPIONSHIP PRES. BY NORTHWESTERN MUTUAL

scoringPlays.text: Bruce Anderson 3 Yd Run (Cam Pedersen Kick)
Darrius Shepherd 50 Yd pass from Easton Stick (Cam Pedersen Kick)
Marcus Marshall 1 Yd Run (Ethan Ratke Kick)

videos.headline: Stick connects with Shepherd for long TD
videos.description: North Dakota State QB Easton Stick lets it fly down the sidelines and finds Darrius Shepherd open for a 50-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Anderson extends for Bison TD
videos.description: Bruce Anderson puts North Dakota State on the board in the FCS Championship with a 3-yard rushing TD in the first quarter.

videos.headline: Robinson's big hit forces first turnover
videos.description: Simeyon Robinson brings the pressure and forces North Dakota State QB Easton Stick to fumble on the big hit.

videos.headline: Tanguay picks off Schor
videos.description: Under heavy pressure, James Madison QB Bryan Schor forces a pass that is picked off by Nate Tanguay in the second quarter.

videos.headline: Stapleton fumbles after big gain
videos.description: James Madison QB Bryan Schor finds Riley Stapleton for a 27-yard gain, but North Dakota's Josh Hayes strips the ball loose to force the turnover.

videos.headline: Stapleton reels in stellar catch
videos.description: James Madison QB Bryan Schor connects with the tightly guarded Riley Stapleton for the nice gain late in the second quarter.

videos.headline: Marshall lays out for JMU TD
videos.description: James Madison's Marcus Marshall takes the handoff up the middle and dives for a 1-yard touchdown in the third quarter.

videos.headline: Bridges forces JMU's 3rd turnover on INT
videos.description: James Madison QB Bryan Schor tries connecting with Ishmael Hyman but is picked off by North Dakota's Marquise Bridges.

videos.headline: Robinson blocks Bison's FG attempt
videos.description: Cam Pedersen tries extending North Dakota State's lead on a 38-yard field goal, but the attempt is blocked by James Madison's Simeyon Robinson in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: JMU executes fake punt for big gain
videos.description: James Madison's punter Harry O'Kelly takes the snap and finds an opening on the outside for the 24-yard rush.

videos.headline: Bison fans storm field after winning FCS title
videos.description: North Dakota State's fans swarm the field after winning the FCS National Championship over James Madison.
